Test Name: Login with Valid Credentials (Mock Bypass)
Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Steps:
Navigating to target login URL
Clearing any existing session storage for isolation
Entering valid email and password
Waiting for redirection to /dashboard
Verifying welcome header presence
Expected Result: User is redirected to the dashboard page, showing welcome banner.

Test Name: Session Persistence after Page Refresh
Preconditions: User is logged into the dashboard.
Test Steps:
Triggering browser page refresh
Checking if still on /dashboard
Verifying welcome header still displays username
Expected Result: Authentication session persists after refresh and user remains on dashboard.

Test Name: Logout Functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the dashboard.
Test Steps:
Clicking Logout in the sidebar drawer
Waiting for redirection to /login
Verifying mock session is cleared from localStorage
Expected Result: Session is cleared from client-side storage, and user is redirected back to login page.

Test Name: Unauthorized Access after Logout
Test Steps:
Attempting direct navigation to /dashboard
Waiting for redirect to /login
Expected Result: Route protection blocks direct access and redirects unauthenticated user back to /login.

Preconditions: User is on the login page.
Test Steps:
Navigating to login URL
Submitting empty login form
Verifying email field is marked invalid / empty check
Expected Result: HTML5 required field constraints prevent form submission.
